description_long: This is a ceramic cup filled with a dark liquid, likely coffee, resting on a matching saucer. The cup and saucer both exhibit a white base color with visible grayish-black stains and smudges, giving them a weathered, used appearance. The cup features a rounded body with a slightly flared rim and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The saucer is broad and shallow, designed to catch spills and support the cup securely. The interior of the cup is filled nearly to the brim, and the liquid surface is dark and opaque. There are no visible logos, branding, or decorative patterns, and the overall finish is matte with some areas appearing slightly glossy due to wear.
description: A stained white ceramic cup with a handle, filled with dark liquid, sits on a matching saucer. The set has a weathered, matte finish with grayish-black smudges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's handle on the right and clear visibility of the dark liquid inside, with prominent stains on the cup and saucer.
description_view_1: Rear angled view with the handle on the left, highlighting more stains on the cup's body and a broader view of the saucer's surface.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle not visible, focusing on the cup's rounded shape and the even distribution of stains around the rim and saucer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again without the handle visible, showing the cup's clean lines and the subtle gradient of stains on the cup and saucer.
